Description.description: Describes the focus of the test that this Test Result answers. This is typically for CI processes but should be human readable for ease of use.

Message.description: A human readable message explaining why this Test Result has turned out the way it has, with potential solutions or links to associated wiki pages.

ID.description: Machine readable identifier for the Test Result.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
